message:
Command `# Line 313 has a bare "0" - this is clearly a bug in the generated RTL
# Check git log to see if this was always there
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
git log --oneline -5 -- mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""
# Check if it's in the repo or was introduced
git show HEAD:mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v 2>/dev/null | sed -n '310,320p' | cat -n` executed with exit code 0.
